title: Wingbeat signals for insect monitoring
subtitle: Identificeren van insecten aan de hand van hun vleugelslag signatuur
description: A guide for using wingbeat signals captured by acoustic and optical sensors to differentiate insect species through AI-based analysis for integrated pest management in vegetable production. It details convolutional neural network approaches, such as InceptionFly, achieving over 90% accuracy in distinguishing pests like Drosophila suzukii, supporting early automated detection.
